lead_text: We designed our services to fit everyone’s needs. Please fill in the details below.
details_placeholder: Any details you’d like to share
step1_text: Tell us what your project or employees need from our laundry services.
step2_text: We quickly assess your needs, estimate the value, and send you a quote.
step3_text: We’ll contact you to sign the contract after you approve the quote.
step4_text: We arrange pickup, clean the items, then deliver them back to you.
